name: ARILGetSigGroupName
title: ARILGetSigGroupName
syntax: long ARILGetSigGroupName (char aMsgName[], dword index, char sigGroupName[], long maxSigGroupNameLen);
description: Retrieves the name of the nth signal group of the PDU.

parameters.name: aMsgName
parameters.description: The symbolic name of a PDU in the database.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Number of the signal group (starting from 0).

parameters.name: sigGroupName
parameters.description: Returns the full name of the designated signal group.

parameters.name: maxSigGroupNameSize
parameters.description: Size of the buffer for the name of the signal group.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
